value.stringValue: Schedule Introductory call for {!$Record.Name} to complete the IR 35 Healthcheck
Check if the IR 35 Healthcheck for {!$Record.Name} has been completed, so that the invoice can be send out.

textTemplates.name: IR35_Tool_Implementation_Description
textTemplates.text: Brand Logo & HEX Code have been requested automatically via email from the Point of Contact in the related Opportunity. Once received, set-up white labelling of the tool. Set up partner on Xero to begin invoicing of the tool.

RICS_Reminder_Email_Subject
textTemplates.text: Check if RICS endorsement required for {!$Record.Account.FirstName} {!$Record.Account.LastName}
